title: Bow to ULTRAKILL alt Revolver
description: A small resource pack that replaces bow with a Slab Revolver from ULTRAKILL.
body:
## Tested on Fabric, but should work on OptiFine too.

# A small resource pack that replaces the bow with an alternative revolver.

![front model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aeef6f82eb13462d13570317f75b44412b2ae02.png)

![back model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a890cf48acaab68113c86e19d063a904d665ac8.png)

Model and texture by Arty.
Sounds from the original game.
